title: campanula mollis var. microphylla
intro: Campanula mollis var. microphylla, also known as the soft-leaved bellflower, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems. Campanula mollis var. microphylla can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies for various ailments.
